testsuite.name: az.unibank.smartorder.order.infrastructure.messaging.consumer.PaymentEventConsumerTest
testsuite.system-out: 2026-06-27T01:45:59.094+04:00 INFO 23472 --- [order-service] [ Test worker] a.u.s.o.i.m.c.PaymentEventConsumer : Received PaymentProcessedEvent: {eventId=38d646b2-eb23-4f55-a500-cff89f0c172d, payload={totalAmount=100.5, orderId=d10b45a7-704a-4159-b61e-fee456ce0569}, correlationId=4f7f09ee-8e63-4df1-9aa0-5595f7a546d4} 2026-06-27T01:45:59.209+04:00 INFO 23472 --- [order-service] [ Test worker] a.u.s.o.i.m.c.PaymentEventConsumer : Received PaymentFailedEvent: {eventId=e7136a11-0f5c-4ff4-b1f7-a1c2245fcd0a, payload={reason=failed, orderId=eb304a1e-761d-44ed-b11c-e4ff5deec512}, correlationId=e395c870-82d1-43e8-bf7f-aeda0834f725}
